figures.caption: Figure 1: The profile of functional connectivity within the identified brain subnetwork over age, as well as the brain map of each age cluster, in the HCP study.
Table D.1: Sample size within age-defined clusters in the HCP Lifespan Study.

Table C.1: Coverage probability (%) of 95% confidence intervals for β∗ 11 and β∗ 21 based on the bootstrap procedure with 500 replications (Bootstrap) and the asymptotic normality result (Asymptotic). Data dimension p = 5, 20, number of clusters m = 20, sample sizes n = 100, 500 and T = 100, 500.

Figure 2: Result of the average projection of the component identified in the HCP study. (a) Similarity of the identified projections for each age cluster and the average projection. (b) The brain map of the average projection. (c) The bubble plot of the projection by age and functional module.

Table 1: Performance of the simulation study, including the similarity of γ̂ and πj and the estimated standard deviation (SE), bias, and mean squared error (MSE) in estimating β. Data dimension p = 5, 20, number of clusters m = 20, sample sizes n = 100, 500 and T = 100, 500.

Figure D.1: The average projection of the component identified in the HCP study. (a) The river plot of the average projection by functional module. (b) The estimated γ value of the average projection.
